expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Several game tiles in the main grids are cut off on the right side of the screen, with titles and labels partially hidden off-canvas.
The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the lower game section, hiding part of the content and making those items hard to see or tap.
The top category pill on the right is truncated ('Hot Ga...'), which makes the label look unfinished.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing responsible gaming icon in the top nav bar; they address layout problems with game tiles, bottom navigation overlap, and category pill truncation.
